mapper.select: SELECT FILE_MD5SUM, FILE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE, IN_USE, FILE_PURPOSE, FLOOR_NO, IS_ZIP_FORMAT, FILE_CONTENT, LAST_USER, LAST_DATETIME FROM WFM_FILE_DEF WHERE DELETE_FLAG = 'N' and FILE_MD5SUM = #{md5sum} order by FILE_MD5SUM, FILE_ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO WFM_FILE_DEF (FILE_MD5SUM, FILE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE, FILE_PURPOSE, FLOOR_NO, IN_USE, IS_ZIP_FORMAT, FILE_CONTENT, DELETE_FLAG, LAST_USER, LAST_DATETIME) VALUES
(#{fileMd5sum}, #{fileIndex}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{filePurpose}, #{floorNo}, 'N', #{isZipFormat} , #{item}, 'N', #{lastUser}, current timestamp )
